hooks.command: git fetch origin --prune 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$branch" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "HEAD" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! git ls-remote --exit-code --heads origin "$branch" > /dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Branch \"$branch\" was deleted from remote (merged). Switching to main."; git checkout main && git pull origin main; elif git merge-base --is-ancestor "origin/$branch" origin/main 2>/dev/null; then echo "Branch \"$branch\" has been merged into main. Switching to main."; git checkout main && git pull origin main; fi
